violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The water pressure device on the dish machine was observed in poor repair (not moving during final rinse cycle). The pressure of the final rinse cycle must read between 15-25 PSI. New Violation. Correct By: 02/18/2026

The dishwasher was observed with the final rinse cycle fluctuating between 90-164 degrees Fahrenheit. Establishment currently using dishwasher to wash ONLY. All dishes and utensils to be rinsed and sanitized in 2-bay sink until dishwasher is serviced. Maintenance service request has been made by PIC prior to inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
The fan covers in the walk-in refrigerator was observed with an accumulation of dust. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
Condensation from the walk-in refrigerator was observed to be frozen on the fan unit. Condensate must drain properly into a drain. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
The hand-washing sink in the ware-washing area of the kitchen was lacking paper towels. New Violation. Correct By: 10/10/2023
